About

The short version

I'm a highly motivated and analytical BS Artificial Intelligence student based in Rawalpindi, Pakistan, with hands-on expertise in Data Science, Python, and Excel. I care about turning numbers into decisions — through clean analysis, clear visualization, and business dashboards that people actually use.

Outside the classroom, I'm building toward integrating AI into real applications: from personalized chatbots to GenAI-powered tools, backed by a steady habit of shipping small projects to GitHub and documenting the process with Git.
